positive: A minimalist and stylized silhouette of a celestial forest. The scene features stylized, leafless trees with delicate, curved branches forming natural, organic patterns against a gradient cosmic background. Include geometric elements like crescent moons and abstract constellations interwoven with the branches. Use a deep indigo and vibrant nebula teal color palette, utilizing strong contrast and negative space. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a seamless print on apparel. Clean line art, highly detailed, symmetrical, vector illustration style.
negative: text, letters, logo, watermark, signature, cropped, fuzzy, blurry, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, messy, dirty, clutter, gradients (except background), photographic
